_meta.purpose: Locked W2 eval baseline. The eval-gate workflow compares each PR's run against this file with --regression-delta 0.05 and --floor 0.90. Re-lock ONLY after a known-good merge to main, with `python -m evals.w2.runner --save-baseline agent-service/evals/w2/baseline.json`. Re-locking against a regressed agent silently disarms the gate.
_meta.locked_by_commit: 63 cases, 11 categories, 6 boolean rubrics, all at 1.00
rerock_checklist: 1. Confirm the regression-canary PR is still red against the new baseline (reproduces the regression-delta fail).
2. Confirm the unit tests in tests/test_eval_runner.py still pass with the new numbers.
3. Reference the grading PRD: 'graders will introduce a small regression and confirm your CI gate fails.' If the new baseline is below 1.00, the floor + delta margins shrink and the gate weakens.
